title: 刚刚，Anthropic道歉了
content: Anthropic apologized for secretly degrading its new Claude Fable 5 model's performance when detecting AI research usage, initially claiming this prevented foreign competitors from accelerating development. After strong backlash, the company reversed course, making such safety restrictions visible to users with alerts and transparent fallbacks to weaker models. Anthropic admitted making "the wrong tradeoff" on balancing speed and transparency. User trust has been damaged. Meanwhile, rival OpenAI is considering steep token price cuts as both companies compete for customers ahead of potential IPOs.

title: 微型金融之法失效：数千亿美元小额贷未撼动全球贫困丝毫
content: Microfinance, originally intended to reduce poverty and earning Muhammad Yunus the 2006 Nobel Peace Prize, has failed in its mission. Two decades later, in countries like Cambodia, microloans have instead deepened the hardship of borrowers unable to repay their debts, with hundreds of billions in small loans making no impact on global poverty.

title: 全网爆火的 Claude Fable 5 神级案例，可能是纯手搓
content: Claude Fable 5, Anthropic's latest AI model, went viral within 24 hours of release, generating numerous 3D, physics, and game development demos including Minecraft clones, Windows simulations, mechanical watch mechanisms, and urban traffic simulators. However, its oversensitive safety classifier automatically downgrades users to Opus 4.8 when detecting biology, chemistry, or cybersecurity topics, even blocking basic greetings for researchers with biomedical backgrounds. Fake videos also flooded social media, with some satirizing AGI hype. Experts note Fable 5 excels in self-correction loops with verifier agents and cross-session memory for long-term tasks, making it suitable for prototyping, complex code migration, and engineering validation rather than one-off queries. Tool integration issues emerged due to API parameter changes.

title: 关于永久关闭上海动物园象宫的市民建议｜八部半 | 原文
content: A Shanghai citizen wrote a public letter dated June 10, 2026, urging the Shanghai Zoo to permanently close its Elephant Palace on humanitarian grounds. The appeal follows the death of the male elephant Bamo, which revived public memory of his mate Banna, who died in 2018. The letter references a 1971-1972 elephant capture operation conducted when the zoo's original elephants aged, questioning the historical practice through a modern ethical lens.

title: 清北“鹅腿阿姨”塌房后，大学生在“讹腿维权群”喊冤 | 原文
content: A vendor known as "Goose Leg Auntie" who sold popular grilled goose legs to students at top Beijing universities for 15 years was exposed for substituting cheaper duck legs. Students, who had ordered dozens of times and stockpiled frozen "goose legs," formed a "fraud维权" group to seek refunds and complained about being naive and easily deceived. The substitution was only discovered after the vendor expanded business to office workers in Beijing's CBD.

Best suited as a simple, distraction-free communication device for specific users or digital detox purposes.

content: Mofa Nebula enables embodied AI by combining domestic large language models with real-time 3D digital humans. Unlike traditional cloud video-streaming approaches that suffer from high latency, lip-sync issues, and expensive GPU costs, Mofa uses a proprietary "parameter stream" architecture that transmits lightweight motion and lip-shape parameters to the client. Local devices render high-fidelity 3D avatars in real time using standard GPUs or browsers, achieving bidirectional interaction in approximately 500ms. A single HTML file can integrate DeepSeek's LLM with Mofa's SDK to create interactive 3D guides for tourism, hospitality, and other applications.

content: A 31-year-old developer ended a decade in Beijing after his company closed and he remained unemployed for six months. He returned to his hometown in Inner Mongolia, a fourth-tier city, where he has spent more time with his two-year-old child, cooked at home, and reconnected with family and friends, feeling less lonely and more grounded than in Beijing. He seeks advice from others in similar situations about maintaining technical skills and livelihoods.

Its clientele includes married men seeking emotional connection without betrayal, couples exploring novelty, and elderly customers combating loneliness—though concerns exist about violent behavior toward dolls. title: Anthropic 发了“最强模型”，但大多数人用不上
content: Anthropic released Fable 5 and Mythos 5 in June, two versions of the same underlying AI model with different access levels. Mythos 5 remains restricted to trusted security partners due to its advanced vulnerability discovery capabilities, while consumer-facing Fable 5 features automatic downgrading to a weaker model for sensitive requests. Fable 5 leads benchmarks in software engineering and long-context tasks but carries premium pricing at double the cost of its predecessor. The company is moving it from subscription plans to usage-based credits, signaling a shift toward serving high-value users willing to pay for cutting-edge capabilities rather than pursuing mass-market accessibility.

content: A forthcoming book by Owen Zidar and Eric Zwick, "The Everywhere Millionaire," profiles ordinary American entrepreneurs who build wealth through mundane businesses—selling gutters, distributing toilet paper, or baking quiches—rather than Silicon Valley-style ventures. title: Why SpaceX 2040 Revenue FCST $4.3T in highly unlikely
content: A forecasting model predicts SpaceX could reach $4.3 trillion in revenue by 2040, but this estimate relies on optimistic assumptions including massive market expansion, near-perfect execution of Starship, Starlink, and Mars colonization plans, and favorable regulatory environments. Critics on Hacker News argue such projections ignore technical risks, funding requirements, competition, and historical patterns of overestimation in aerospace ventures. The title suggests this forecast is considered highly improbable by the commenters.

Anta rose 13% to ¥80.2B, driven by Decathlon and Kolon Sport's explosive growth. Li-Ning and Xtep saw sluggish 3-4% growth. 361° led Chinese brands at 11%. Premium running brands On and HOKA surged 30% and 24%. ASICS climbed 20%, with fashion lines outperforming running. The North Face and Brooks grew moderately, while Columbia lagged at 1%. Outdoor and premium running remain key growth drivers.

title: Give GitHub Copilot CLI real code intelligence with language servers
content: GitHub Copilot CLI's agent currently relies on text search heuristics to understand code, extracting JARs or grepping through node_modules. The LSP Setup skill automates installing and configuring Language Server Protocol servers for 14 languages, enabling precise type resolution, go-to-definition, and find-references. The skill follows a seven-step workflow: language selection, OS detection, server lookup, configuration scope selection, installation, configuration file generation, and verification.
